headline: LULULEMON ATHLETICA INC (NASDAQ:LULU): A Decent Value Play with Premium Quality at a Discounted Price
summary: Discover why Lululemon Athletica (LULU) scores high on the 'Decent Value' screen: strong profitability, debt-free health, and a P/E of 9.63 signal a quality stock at a discount.
